examples: At present, Reebok shoes are available in about five thousand retail stores in the United States.
Reebok executives do not like to hear their stylish athletic shoes called "footwear for yuppies".
If I see a Reebok official who may not be in the best shape firing the starting pistol and Carl Lewis wearing Nike shoes, I'm going to go with Carl because that's the authentic link.
As Shaq moved from Orlando to Los Angeles, sales of his Reebok shoe were only so-so.
Over the same period, Reebok also saw its Buzz score rise, from 9.5 to 19.3.
